author: Dr. Priya Anand / Dr. Alan Whitfield
content:
MEDICINE CO-MANAGEMENT — DAILY PROGRESS NOTE
POD#4 s/p open cholecystectomy. Day before anticipated discharge.

SUBJECTIVE: Feels well overall. Reports she did not notice any change during this afternoon's rhythm event. Continues to ask about returning home and resuming driving.

OBJECTIVE:
- Surgically recovered: afebrile, tolerating a regular diet, ambulating independently, incision healing, pain minimal.
- Labs (LAB003): WBC normalized (7.4); renal function at baseline (Cr 0.9, eGFR ~68); INR 1.0; LFTs normalized.
- Rhythm: a single, asymptomatic, ~2-hour episode of atrial fibrillation this afternoon (ventricular rate 70-105, hemodynamically tolerated), which spontaneously converted to sinus. See telemetry event note (NOTE008) and ECG (IMG004) for the detailed characterization. No episodes on POD#2 or POD#3.
- On NO therapeutic anticoagulation; prophylactic enoxaparin only.

ASSESSMENT/PLAN:
#Atrial fibrillation — a second documented episode this admission, today on POD#4 (asymptomatic, ~2 h, spontaneous conversion; see telemetry event note and ECG). Surgically ready for discharge tomorrow.
- Continue telemetry for the remainder of admission.
#HTN/T2DM — resume home regimen at discharge.
attestation: Electronically signed by Dr. Priya Anand, MD (PGY-2) and Dr. Alan Whitfield, MD (Medicine attending). 6/14/2027.
